rules:
Switch your opponent's Active Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

attacks.name: Rock Slide
attacks.effect: Does 10 damage to 2 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: This extremely rare Pokémon is a different color than usual. It is very hard to find.

attacks.name: Mind Shock
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness or Resistance.

flavorText: This extremely rare Pokémon is a different color than usual. It is very hard to find.

attacks.name: Blow Through
attacks.effect: If there is any Stadium card in play, this attack does 30 more damage.

attacks.name: Power Blast
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, discard an Energy attached to this Pokémon.

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Night Spear
attacks.effect: Does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Tromp
attacks.effect: Does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Giant Claw
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon already has 2 or more damage counters on it, this attack does 40 more damage.

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Thunder Fang
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Volt Bolt
attacks.effect: Discard all Lightning Energy attached to this Pokémon. This attack does 100 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness or Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Smash Turn
attacks.effect: You may switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Dual Splash
attacks.effect: This attack does 50 damage to 2 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Fire Fang
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

attacks.name: Grand Flame
attacks.effect: Attach a Fire Energy from your discard pile to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Discard 2 cards from your hand. (If you can't discard 2 cards, you can't play this card.) Search your deck for a Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Once during each player's turn, that player may flip a coin. If heads, that player may play a Restored Pokémon from their hand onto their Bench.

This card stays in play when you play it. Discard this card if another Stadium card comes into play. If another card with the same name is in play, you can't play this card.

Choose 1 of your Basic Pokémon in play. If you have a Stage 2 card in your hand that evolves from that Pokémon, put that card on the Basic Pokémon. (This counts as evolving that Pokémon.) You can't use this card during your first turn or on a Basic Pokémon that was put into play this turn.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Reveal cards from the top of your deck until you reveal a Supporter card. Put it into your hand. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Discard your hand and draw 7 cards.

You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

Look at the bottom 7 cards of your deck. You may reveal an Aerodactyl you find there and put it onto your Bench. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Each player shuffles his or her hand into his or her deck. Then, each player draws a card for each of his or her remaining Prize cards.

You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

Flip a coin. If heads, choose 3 random cards from your opponent's hand. Your opponent reveals those cards and shuffles them into his or her deck.

You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

Discard a Special Energy attached to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Attach a basic Darkness Energy card from your discard pile to 1 of your Benched Darkness Pokémon.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Attach a Pokémon Tool to 1 of your Pokémon that doesn't already have a Pokémon Tool attached to it.

If this card is attached to a Darkness Pokémon, each of the attacks of that Pokémon does 20 more damage to the Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Draw 3 cards.

You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

attacks.name: Blow Through
attacks.effect: If there is any Stadium card in play, this attack does 30 more damage.

attacks.name: Power Blast
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, discard an Energy attached to this Pokémon.

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Stunning Uppercut
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. If both of them are heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed. If both of them are tails, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: Their sturdy tusks will stay sharp even if used to cut steel beams. These Pokémon are covered in hard armor.

attacks.name: Special Fang
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has a Special Energy attached to it, this attack does 40 more damage.

attacks.name: Ferocious Bellow
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, any damage done by attacks from the Defending Pokémon is reduced by 30 (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

flavorText: It rescues people stranded by blizzards in the mountains. Its shaggy fur shields it from the cold.

attacks.name: Roar
attacks.effect: Your opponent switches the Defending Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon.

flavorText: It has a black, cape-like fur that is very hard and decreases the amount of damage it receives.

attacks.name: Take Down
attacks.effect: This Pokémon does 10 damage to itself.

flavorText: The long hair around its face provides an amazing radar that lets it sense subtle changes in its surroundings.

attacks.name: Tone-Deaf
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

flavorText: Its tongue is just like a human's. As a result, it can cleverly mimic human speech.
Because its genetic makeup is irregular, it quickly changes its form due to a variety of causes.

attacks.name: Surprise Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: Because its genetic makeup is irregular, it quickly changes its form due to a variety of causes.

attacks.name: Double-Edge
attacks.effect: This Pokémon does 60 damage to itself.

flavorText: The eggs it lays are filled with happiness. Eating even one bite will bring a smile to anyone.

attacks.name: Continuous Tumble
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: A kindly Pokémon that lays highly nutritious eggs and shares them with injured Pokémon or people.

attacks.name: Sing
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Double-Edge
attacks.effect: This Pokémon does 30 damage to itself.

flavorText: A kindly Pokémon that lays highly nutritious eggs and shares them with injured Pokémon or people.

attacks.name: Aerial Ace
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

flavorText: Bisharp pursues prey in the company of a large group of Pawniard. Then Bisharp finishes off the prey.
They fight at Bisharp's command. They cling to their prey and inflict damage by sinking their blades into it.

attacks.name: Metal Blast
attacks.effect: Does 20 more damage for each Metal Energy attached to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Lock Gear
attacks.effect: Draw cards until you have 6 cards in your hand.

flavorText: The gear with the red core is rotated at high speed for a rapid energy charge.

attacks.name: Charge Beam
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, attach an Energy card from your discard pile to this Pokémon.

flavorText: Spinning minigears are rotated at high speed and repeatedly fired away. It is dangerous if the gears don't return.

attacks.name: Smash Turn
attacks.effect: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavorText: Interlocking two bodies and spinning around generates the energy they need to live.

attacks.name: Joust
attacks.effect: Before doing damage, discard a Pokémon Tool card attached to the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Cavalry Lance
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon has no Weakness.

flavorText: They fly around at high speed, striking with their pointed spears. Even when in trouble, they face opponents bravely.

attacks.name: Whirlwind
attacks.effect: Your opponent switches the Defending Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon.

flavorText: Its wings are too tiny to allow it to fly. As the time approaches for it to evolve, it discards the bones it was wearing.

attacks.name: Fury Cutter
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. If 1 of them is heads, this attack does 10 more damage. If 2 of them are heads, this attack does 30 more damage. If all of them are heads, this attack does 60 more damage.

flavorText: Bisharp pursues prey in the company of a large group of Pawniard. Then Bisharp finishes off the prey.

attacks.name: Brutal Bash
attacks.effect: Does 20 damage times the number of Darkness Pokémon you have in play.

attacks.name: Dark Rush
attacks.effect: Does 20 damage times the number of damage counters on this Pokémon.

flavorText: Bonds between these Pokémon are very strong. It protects the safety of its pack by tricking its opponents.

attacks.name: Paralyzing Gaze
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Shadow Bind
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon can't retreat during your opponent's next turn.

flavorText: To protect themselves from danger, they hide their true identities by transforming into people and Pokémon.

attacks.name: Ascension
attacks.effect: Search your deck for a card that evolves from this Pokémon and put it onto this Pokémon. (This counts as evolving this Pokémon.) Shuffle your deck afterward.

flavorText: It changes into the forms of others to surprise them. Apparently, it often transforms into a silent child.

attacks.name: Crushing Blow
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy attached to the Defending Pokémon.

flavorText: Groups of them beat up anything that enters their territory. Each can spit acidic liquid from its mouth.

attacks.name: Rising Lunge
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

flavorText: Its skin has a rubbery elasticity, so it can reduce damage by defensively pulling its skin up to its neck.

attacks.name: Dark Clamp
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon can't retreat during your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Bombast
attacks.effect: Does 40 damage times the number of Prize cards you have taken.

flavorText: They never allow prey to escape. Their jaws are so powerful, they can crush the body of an automobile.
They live in groups of a few individuals. Protective membranes shield their eyes from sandstorms.

attacks.name: Sand Dive
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks during your opponent's next turn.

flavorText: They live buried in the sands of the desert. The sun-warmed sands prevent their body temperature from dropping.

attacks.name: Night Spear
attacks.effect: Does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Confuse Ray
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Junk Hunt
attacks.effect: Put 2 Item cards from your discard pile into your hand.

flavorText: It hides in the darkness of caves. Its diet of gems has transformed its eyes into gemstones.

attacks.name: Confuse Ray
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Shadow Shutdown
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. If both of them are heads, discard all Energy attached to the Defending Pokémon.

flavorText: When exposed to the moon's aura, the rings on its body glow faintly and it gains a mysterious power.

attacks.name: Shadow Drain
attacks.effect: Heal from this Pokémon the same amount of damage you did to the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Slashing Strike
attacks.effect: This Pokémon can't use Slashing Strike during your next turn.

flavorText: When exposed to the moon's aura, the rings on its body glow faintly and it gains a mysterious power.

attacks.name: Steel Swing
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 60 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: They strengthen their bodies by carrying steel beams. They show off their big muscles to their friends.
These Pokémon appear at building sites and help out with construction. They always carry squared logs.

attacks.name: Reinforced Drill
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has a Pokémon Tool card attached to it, this attack does 30 more damage.

attacks.name: Mach Claw
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by Resistance.

flavorText: It can help in tunnel construction. Its drill has evolved into steel strong enough to bore through iron plates.

attacks.name: Tunnel Strike
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Dig Uppercut
attacks.effect: Put a card from your discard pile into your hand.

flavorText: More than 300 feet below the surface, they build mazelike nests. Their activity can be destructive to subway tunnels.
It makes its way swiftly through the soil by putting both claws together and rotating at high speed.

attacks.name: Tromp
attacks.effect: Does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Giant Claw
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon already has 2 or more damage counters on it, this attack does 40 more damage.

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.
Put this card onto your Bench only with the effect of Old Amber Aerodactyl
flavorText: A Pokémon that roamed the skies in the dinosaur era. Its teeth are like saw blades.

attacks.name: Chuck
attacks.effect: Discard as many Pokémon Tool cards as you like from your hand. This attack does 40 damage times the number of cards you discarded.

attacks.name: Lock Up
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon can't retreat during your opponent's next turn.

flavorText: It has been said that they swallow those who get too close and turn them into mummies. They like to eat gold nuggets.

attacks.name: Astonish
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, choose a card at random from your opponent's hand. Your opponent reveals that card and shuffles it into his or her deck.

flavorText: Each of them carries a mask that used to be its face when it was human. Sometimes they look at it and cry.

attacks.name: Supersonic
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

flavorText: Suction from its nostrils enables it to stick to cave walls during sleep. It leaves a heart-shaped mark behind.

attacks.name: Psy Bolt
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Hand Press
attacks.effect: If you have more cards in your hand than your opponent, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavorText: Being bitten by Shellder gave it intelligence comparable to that of award-winning scientists.

attacks.name: Psy Report
attacks.effect: Your opponent reveals his or her hand.

flavorText: Its fur is so sensitive, it can sense minute shifts in the air and predict the weather.

attacks.name: Suction Heal
attacks.effect: Heal from this Pokémon the same amount of damage you did to the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Slurp Shakedown
attacks.effect: Switch the Defending Pokémon with 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. This attack does 60 damage to the new Defending Pokémon.

flavorText: With their sucker mouths, they suck in prey. Then they use their fangs to shock the prey with electricity.

attacks.name: Shock Bolt
attacks.effect: Discard all Lightning Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavorText: These Pokémon have a big appetite. When they spot their prey, they attack it and paralyze it with electricity.

attacks.name: Spark
attacks.effect: Does 10 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: These Pokémon move in schools. They have an electricity-generating organ, so they discharge electricity if in danger.

attacks.name: Charge Beam
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, attach an Energy card from your discard pile to this Pokémon.

flavorText: These Pokémon move in schools. They have an electricity-generating organ, so they discharge electricity if in danger.

attacks.name: Quick Turn
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Electrisilk
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon has no Retreat Cost, this attack does 40 more damage.

flavorText: They employ an electrically charged web to trap their prey. While it is immobilized by shock, they leisurely consume it.
They attach themselves to large-bodied Pokémon and absorb static electricity, which they store in an electric pouch.
They attach themselves to large-bodied Pokémon and absorb static electricity, which they store in an electric pouch.

attacks.name: Negative Ion
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, any damage done by attacks from the Defending Pokémon is reduced by 30 (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Electrishower
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: It cheers on friends. If its friends are losing, its body lets off more and more sparks.

attacks.name: Tag Draw
attacks.effect: Shuffle your hand into your deck. Then, draw 4 cards. If Minun is on your Bench, draw 4 more cards.

attacks.name: Positive Ion
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 more damage.

flavorText: It cheers on friends with pom-poms made of sparks. It drains power from telephone poles.

attacks.name: Thunder Fang
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Volt Bolt
attacks.effect: Discard all Lightning Energy attached to this Pokémon. This attack does 100 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness or Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Electrigun
attacks.effect: You may discard a Lightning Energy attached to this Pokémon. If you do, this attack does 40 more damage.

attacks.name: Pin Missile
attacks.effect: Flip 4 coins. This attack does 40 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: If agitated, it uses electricity to straighten out its fur and launch it in small bunches.

attacks.name: Healing Dance
attacks.effect: Heal 30 damage from each of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Incessant Peck
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 20 more damage for each heads.

flavorText: Swanna start to dance at dusk. The one dancing in the middle is the leader of the flock.

attacks.name: Water Pulse
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

flavorText: These bird Pokémon are excellent divers. They swim around in the water eating their favorite food—peat moss.

attacks.name: Triple Spin
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: Snowy mountains are this Pokémon's habitat. During an ancient ice age, they moved to southern areas.

attacks.name: Double Spin
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: The temperature of their breath is -58° F. They create snow crystals and make snow fall in the areas surrounding them.

attacks.name: Bubble Beam
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: It lives in the water and on land. It uses its long, sticky tongue to capture prey.

attacks.name: Spiral Drain
attacks.effect: Heal 20 damage from this Pokémon.

flavorText: They warn other of danger by vibrating their cheeks to create a high-pitched sound.

attacks.name: Quick Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

attacks.name: Reflect Energy
attacks.effect: Move an Energy from this Pokémon to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavorText: By controlling its body heat, it can freeze the atmosphere around it to make a diamond-dust flurry.

attacks.name: Attack Command
attacks.effect: Does 10 damage times the number of Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent's).

flavorText: If anyone were to hurt its pride, it would slash them with wings that can cleave through an ice floe.

attacks.name: Fury Attack
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: Because every Prinplup considers itself to be the most important, they can never form a group.

attacks.name: Fury Attack
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: A poor walker, it often falls down. However, its strong pride makes it puff up its chest without a care.

attacks.name: Smash Turn
attacks.effect: You may switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Dual Splash
attacks.effect: This attack does 50 damage to 2 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Muddy Water
attacks.effect: Does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Spiral Drain
attacks.effect: Heal 20 damage from this Pokémon.

flavorText: Its cell composition is similar to water molecules. As a result, it can melt away into water.

attacks.name: Lazy Headbutt
attacks.effect: This Pokémon is now Asleep.

flavorText: Though usually dim witted, it seems to become inspired if the Shellder on its tail bites down.

attacks.name: Big Yawn
attacks.effect: Both this Pokémon and the Defending Pokémon are now Asleep.

attacks.name: Shot in the Dark
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. If either of them is tails, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: Although slow, it is skilled at fishing with its tail. It does not feel pain if its tail is bitten.

attacks.name: Burning Wind
attacks.effect: You may discard an Energy attached to this Pokémon. If you do, the Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

flavorText: A sea of fire engulfs the surroundings of their battles, since they use their six wings to scatter their ember scales.

attacks.name: Super Singe
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

flavorText: The base of volcanoes is where they make their homes. They shoot fire from their five horns to repel attacking enemies.
This Pokémon was believed to have been born from the sun. When it evolves, its entire body is engulfed in flames.

attacks.name: Hot Lick
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon is Durant, this attack does 50 more damage.

attacks.name: Firebreathing
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

flavorText: Using their very hot, flame-covered tongues, they burn through Durant's steel bodies and consume their insides.

attacks.name: Flame Cloak
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, attach a Fire Energy card from your discard pile to this Pokémon.

flavorText: It burns coal inside its shell for energy. It blows out black soot if it is endangered.

attacks.name: Blaze Kick
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage. If tails, the Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

attacks.name: Flamethrower
attacks.effect: Discard an Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavorText: Flames spout from its wrists, enveloping its knuckles. Its punches scorch it foes.

attacks.name: Double Kick
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Flamethrower
attacks.effect: Discard an Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavorText: Its kicking mastery lets it loose 10 kicks per second. It emits sharp cries to intimidate foes.
A fire burns inside, so it feels very warm to hug. It launches fireballs of 1,800 degrees F.

attacks.name: Reckless Charge
attacks.effect: This Pokémon does 10 damage to itself.

flavorText: A fire burns inside, so it feels very warm to hug. It launches fireballs of 1,800 degrees F.

attacks.name: Fire Fang
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

attacks.name: Grand Flame
attacks.effect: Attach a Fire Energy card from your discard pile to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Sand-Attack
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon tries to attack during your opponent's next turn, your opponent flips a coin. If tails, that attack does nothing.

attacks.name: Fire Slash
attacks.effect: You may discard a Fire Energy attached to this Pokémon. If you do, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavorText: Inhaled air is heated in the flame sac in its body to an intense fire over 3,000 degrees Fahrenheit.

attacks.name: Deck and Cover
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed and Poisoned. Shuffle this Pokémon and all cards attached to it into your deck.

flavorText: When its body dries out, it weakens. So, to prevent dehydration, it wraps itself in many layers of thin membrane.

attacks.name: Body Slam
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: When attacked, it defends itself by closing the lid of its shell. It can spit a sticky, poisonous liquid.

attacks.name: Reckless Charge
attacks.effect: This Pokémon does 10 damage to itself.

flavorText: These mysterious Pokémon evolve when they receive electrical stimulation while they are in the same place as Shelmet.

attacks.name: Heavy Bullet
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: It possesses legs of enormous strength, enabling it to carry heavy slabs for many days, even when crossing arid land.
It makes a hole in a suitable rock. If that rock breaks, the Pokémon remains agitated until it locates a replacement.

attacks.name: Quick Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

attacks.name: Energy Assist
attacks.effect: Attach a basic Energy card from your discard pile to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavorText: It basically does not fight. With cells similar to those of plants, it can perform photosynthesis.

attacks.name: Lure Poison
attacks.effect: Switch the Defending Pokémon with 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. The new Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

attacks.name: Spit Squall
attacks.effect: Your opponent puts the Defending Pokémon and all cards attached to it into his or her hand.

flavorText: It binds itself to trees on marshes. It attracts prey with its sweet-smelling drool and gulps them down.

attacks.name: Air Slash
attacks.effect: Discard an Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavorText: The sharp scythes on its forearms become increasingly sharp by cutting through hard objects.

attacks.name: Poison Powder
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

flavorText: After a rainy day, the flower on its back smells stronger. The scent attracts other Pokémon.

attacks.name: Sleep Powder
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Poison Powder
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

flavorText: When the bud on its back starts swelling, a sweet aroma wafts to indicate the flower's coming bloom.
For some time after its birth, it grows by gaining nourishment from the seed on its back.
